zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Neufchâtel於1209年出生在瑞士波格a特爾可勒斯時，她的父親Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau34歲，母親Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg33歲。她於1229年與Pierre I Sire De Grandison在瑞士波格a特爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年8月31日在英國英格蘭享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Neufchâtel于1209年出生在瑞士波格a特爾可勒斯时，她的父亲Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau34岁，母亲Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg33岁。她于1229年与Pierre I Sire De Grandison在瑞士波格a特爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年8月31日在英国英格兰享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Neufchâtel was born in 1209, in Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland, her father, Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau, was 34 and her mother, Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg, was 33. She married Pierre I Sire De Grandison in 1229, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 31 August 1263, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzer: Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Neufchâtel est née en 1209, à Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse, son père, Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Pierre I Sire De Grandison en 1229, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 août 1263, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Neufchâtel 1209 in Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau 34 und ihre Mutter Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg 33. Sie hat 1229 in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz Pierre I Sire De Grandison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. August 1263 im Alter von 54 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Neufchâtel è nata il nel 1209 nel Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera, sua padre, Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Pierre I Sire De Grandison nel 1229, nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 31 agosto 1263, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Neufchâtelが1209年にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルコルセレスで生まれた時，父Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidauは34歳，母Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arbergは33歳であった。1229年にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルでPierre I Sire De Grandisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年8月31日にイギリスイギリスで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Neufchâtel(이)가 1209년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔 코르셀레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1229년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 Pierre I Sire De Grandison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 8월 31일 영국 잉글랜드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Neufchâtel nasceu em 1209, em Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça, seu pai, Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Pierre I Sire De Grandison em 1229, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1263, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Neufchâtel родилась в 1209 г. в местности корселлесь, неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pierre I Sire De Grandison в 1229 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 31 августа 1263 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Neufchâtel nació en 1209, en Corcelles, Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza, su papá, Ulrich III. Graf  Neuenburg zu Nidau, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jolanthe Gräfin von Urach Arberg, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Pierre I Sire De Grandison en 1229, en Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1263, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
